title: Exit Liquidity - HypurrFi Everything
summary_title: HypurrFi's lending, cards, and Pokemon perpetuals: building real finance on Hyperliquid
summary_description: How HypurrFi is expanding beyond Aave forks to Euler, trading terminals, and permissionless markets—including Pokemon card index futures.

key_moments.label: Andy explains why HypurrFi chose Hyperliquid after the airdrop
HypurrFi core product: lending for traders, no forced liquidations
The card product: borrow against collateral like a credit card, tax-free
Euler launch: niche lending markets for PT tokens and yield assets
Trading terminal alpha (PURRS): lending + perps + options in one UI
HIP-3 permissionless markets: Pokemon card index perpetuals launching
Kurt on the real barrier to retail adoption: security and custody, not education alone
Points program: highest incentives on Hype and stablecoin supply, card rewards

pull_quote: When you start thinking in terms of lending and borrowing, you unlock your capital in ways you couldn't before. It's wild.
